settings.title: Metal Building Insulation
settings.text:
You can’t see energy (heat) enter or leave your metal building. That’s why we recommend installing our top-of-the-line vapor barrier/radiant barrier metal building insulation products. Only then can you start preventing energy (heat) gain or loss and reduce energy consumption inside the building.

Without question, it’s money well spent to pay lower energy bills and keep your metal building comfortable for the people inside. We have thousands of insulation rolls in stock that can be shipped out for you as soon as today.

As we manufacture and distribute BlueTex™ Insulation, we can guarantee that our products are, without a doubt, the best metal building vapor barrier insulation solution that you can currently buy on the market. Don’t take our word for it and get a free sample kit today and test it for yourself.
Read why our customers consistently rate us at 5-stars after buying and installation BlueTex™ insulation.

settings.title: Check out our repair/cover system for older buildings
settings.text:
If your building has old, torn, falling down or dirty insulation, BlueTex™ Pro is a great option to easily cover up the old insulation and create a new, bright white, durable interior finish.

You can just cover some walls or all of them. We also have a proven system for roof insulation cover ups with our EasyClips™. We can help you do it right!
settings.button_label: Learn How to Do the Install

settings.title: Lifetime Warranty
settings.text: All BlueTex™ metal building insulation rolls have a Limited LIFETIME warranty.

settings.title: How To Fix Torn, Ripped, Stained Metal Building Insulation In Existing Buildings
settings.text: The BlueTex Wall/Repair system creates a NEW internal tearproof and puncture resistant internal vapor barrier surface. Individual pieces are installed between the purlins or girts and attached with termination (termbars) with self-drilling metal screws.
